# KL Servis Rumah

> Market-rate painting, plumbing, ceiling, waterproofing and handyman services for Kuala Lumpur and Selangor, Malaysia.

## Core pages

- https://www.klservisrumah.my/ — Homepage and booking entry point.
- https://www.klservisrumah.my/services — Service directory.
- https://www.klservisrumah.my/contact — Booking form and dispatch contact.
- https://www.klservisrumah.my/faq — Frequently asked questions.

## Services

- Painting: /services/painting
- Plumbing: /services/plumbing
- Ceiling and partitions: /services/ceiling
- Waterproofing and PU grouting: /services/waterproofing
- Handyman: /services/handyman

## Coverage

KL Servis Rumah serves Kuala Lumpur, Petaling Jaya, Subang Jaya, Puchong, Shah Alam, Klang and surrounding Klang Valley suburbs.

## Pricing principle

All public prices should follow standard Malaysian market rates: not inflated, not underpriced, and confirmed before work starts.

## Contact

Phone and WhatsApp: +60 11-1662 7349
